columns.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns.wp_hMpc: projected correlation function w_p in h^-1 Mpc

triple_check: 12 rp values are monotonically increasing from 0.183 to 52.19 h^-1 Mpc
wp values are positive and broadly decreasing with rp
wp_err/wp ratios are ~15%, consistent with Figure 2 error bars
units: rp, wp, wp_err all in h^-1 Mpc (confirmed by axis labels in Figure 2)
cross-checked against AUM code comparison test (tests/test_aum_comparison.py)
notes: More+2015 used a 5-param fit (alpha_inc=1, log10m_inc fixed). WMAP7 cosmology from Table 1 of their paper.
